KURT BRIDGMAN APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT EDWARD LITKE. DEFENDANT EDWARD LITKE'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL WAS PRESENTED TO THE COURT. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT ORDERED THE DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE A DECLARATION SIGNED UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY WITH SPECIFIC FACTS REGARDING TRIAL READINESS BY TOMORROW. THE COURT WILL NOT ACCEPT ANY OTHER MOTION BASED ON THIS KIND OF EVIDENCE. IF THE DECLARATION IS NOT SUBMITTED, THE COURT WILL CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE FOR A SHORT CONTINUANCE OR SOONER. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
